blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Okay. Listen. This is important. A senior girl asked you to the movies. That is not a casual thing. That is a deliberate thing.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Do you though? Because you're sitting here calm and you should not be calm right now.
Jonathan laughed — the real one, not the performative one. I'd learned the difference.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Okay. Good. Just — be yourself Friday. Not tryout you. Not practice you. The version of you that she's been sitting on the steps with. That's the one she asked.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: When did you get like this.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: I've always been like this. You just don't pay attention.
